title: Single global Mutex serializes all DB access
evidence: handlers.rs:14 SharedDb = Arc<Mutex<Connection>>; every handler calls db.lock().unwrap()
suggestion: For concurrency, use a connection pool (r2d2/deadpool) instead of one Mutex-wrapped connection; acceptable for this task's scope

title: Mutex lock uses .unwrap(), panics on poisoning
suggestion: Map a poisoned lock to AppError::Internal rather than panicking the handler task

title: PUT requires full body (title+author) — no partial update
evidence: handlers.rs:89 update_book calls input.validate() so PUT rejects bodies missing title/author
suggestion: Consistent with PUT-as-replace semantics; note only — not a spec deviation
